name: Mersey Point Smoked Mackerel Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and bones from smoked mackerel.
2. Mix and blend smoked mackerel with cream cheese, lemon juice, onion, celery, and horseradish until smooth.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Spread the mixture on plastic wrap and form it into a log shape.
5. Refrigerate the log until firm.
6. Combine crushed almonds and chopped parsley in a bowl.
7. Roll the chilled log in the almond-parsley mixture.
8. Serve with crackers.
